steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is a transition word or phrase. The task is to identify the logical relationship between the sentence introducing Kenya's voting age (18) and the sentence about Brazil's voting age (16).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘Firstly,’: Implies the sentence is the first item in a numbered sequence. The passage is not listing a series of points. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Therefore,’: Signals that Brazil's voting age is a logical consequence of Kenya's — it isn't. These are independent facts. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘By comparison,’: Directly signals a contrast between two things being measured against each other — Kenya's voting age (18) versus Brazil's (16). ✓
  • Choice D — ‘For example,’: Treats Brazil as an illustration of a general rule just stated. No general rule is being illustrated; two specific countries are being compared. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
